data.title: International Public Partnerships Announces Share Buyback
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

An update from International Public Partnerships Limited ( (GB:INPP) ) is now available.

International Public Partnerships Limited has repurchased 150,000 of its ordinary shares at a price of 119.0 GBp each on the London Stock Exchange, with plans to hold these shares in treasury. This transaction is part of the company’s ongoing strategy to manage its capital structure effectively, maintaining a balance between issued shares and treasury shares, with a current holding of 33,300,000 shares in treasury out of 1,877,943,132 ordinary shares in issue.

More about International Public Partnerships Limited

International Public Partnerships Limited (INPP) is a listed infrastructure investment company that focuses on global public infrastructure projects across various sectors, including utilities, transport, education, health, and digital infrastructure. With a responsible, long-term investment approach, INPP is involved in over 140 projects in regions such as the UK, Europe, Australia, New Zealand, and North America, aiming to provide its shareholders with long-term yield and capital growth.

YTD Price Performance: -7.49%

Average Trading Volume: 3,211,167

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

For a thorough assessment of INPP stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Entergy Settles SEC Investigation with $12 Million Penalty
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Entergy ( (ETR) ) has provided an announcement.

Entergy Corporation has reached a settlement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to resolve an investigation into its internal controls and inventory management. The company will pay a $12 million civil penalty and has implemented enhanced inventory processes and controls, which did not materially affect its inventory value.

data.title: Cresud Completes Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Cresud Sociedad ( (CRESY) ) has issued an announcement.

Cresud Sociedad announced the completion of its shares buyback program, acquiring 4,522,623 common shares in the local market, which represents approximately 99.98% of the approved program and 0.75% of the outstanding shares. This strategic move increases Cresud’s treasury shares to 6,397,536 ordinary shares, accounting for 1.06% of its total issued shares, potentially enhancing shareholder value and reflecting confidence in its market position.

More about Cresud Sociedad

Cresud Sociedad Anónima, Comercial, Inmobiliaria, Financiera y Agropecuaria is an Argentine company engaged in various industries including real estate, finance, and agriculture. The company operates in the local and international markets, being listed on both the Buenos Aires Stock Exchange (BYMA) and the NASDAQ.

data.title: BlackRock’s Voting Rights in Land Securities Group PLC Adjusted
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

An announcement from Land Securities Group plc REIT ( (GB:LAND) ) is now available.

Land Securities Group PLC has announced a change in the voting rights held by BlackRock, Inc., a major shareholder. BlackRock’s total voting rights in the company have decreased slightly from 10.89% to 10.50%, as indicated by the recent notification. This change in voting rights could influence the company’s decision-making process and strategic direction, potentially affecting stakeholder interests depending on how these voting rights are exercised in future shareholder meetings.

More about Land Securities Group plc REIT

Land Securities Group PLC is a leading real estate investment trust (REIT) in the UK, specializing in property management, development, and investment. The company focuses on commercial properties including office spaces, retail centers, and mixed-use developments, primarily targeting urban areas for growth and expansion.

data.title: Vertical Aerospace Boosts Financial Stability and Advances Flight Testing
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Vertical Aerospace ( (EVTL) ) has issued an announcement.

Vertical Aerospace has announced significant financial and operational advancements in its third quarter of 2024. The company secured up to $50 million in new funding to enhance its financial stability and support its ‘Flightpath 2030’ strategy. This funding will aid in removing barriers to third-party investment and support operations through 2025. Additionally, Vertical achieved a major milestone by launching Phase 2 of its piloted flight test program and won an industry award for its zero-emission aviation technology, positioning itself as a leader in the aerospace sector.

More about Vertical Aerospace

Vertical Aerospace is a global aerospace and technology company pioneering electric aviation with its zero-emission VX4 aircraft. It partners with leading aerospace firms to advance its proprietary battery and propeller technology while boasting approximately 1,500 pre-orders from major airlines. Founded in 2016 and headquartered in Bristol, the company aims to provide a safer, cleaner, and quieter mode of air travel.

data.title: Carnival Corporation Reports Record 2024 Results, Forecasts Growth
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Carnival ( (GB:CCL) ) just unveiled an update.

Carnival Corporation & plc reported record financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2024, with revenues reaching an all-time high of $25 billion, driven by strong demand and pricing strategies. The company achieved significant growth in net income, operating income, and adjusted EBITDA, surpassing its previous guidance. With a robust booking position for 2025 and efforts to enhance cruise travel awareness, Carnival is set for continued growth, expecting a 20 percent increase in earnings in 2025 and reaching its 2026 SEA Change EBITDA target a year early. The company also made progress in sustainability, reducing greenhouse gas emissions and food waste, while continuing to finance its newbuild program at favorable rates.

More about Carnival

Carnival Corporation & plc operates in the cruise industry, offering a range of cruise experiences across its portfolio of major cruise lines. It focuses on providing cruise vacations to a diverse global customer base, enhancing onboard experiences, and expanding its market reach through strategic destination planning.

data.title: BioAtla Highlights Advancements in CAB Cancer Therapy
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

BioAtla ( (BCAB) ) just unveiled an update.

BioAtla, Inc. has updated its corporate presentation to highlight its advancements in CAB technology for cancer therapy. The company emphasizes the clinical benefits of CAB technology, which targets the acidic microenvironment of tumor cells, thereby increasing selectivity and reducing side effects. BioAtla is progressing several clinical-stage programs with plans to continue development through early 2026, potentially enhancing its industry positioning and offering new therapeutic options for previously undruggable targets.

More about BioAtla

BioAtla, Inc. is a clinical-stage company focused on developing targeted cancer therapies using its Conditionally Active Biologics (CAB) technology. The company’s primary products are monoclonal antibodies that bind to epitopes exposed in acidic pH environments of tumor cells, enhancing therapeutic exposure and tumor selectivity while reducing toxicity compared to traditional antibodies. BioAtla is advancing multiple clinical and pre-clinical programs and is headquartered in San Diego, CA.

YTD Price Performance: -51.63%

Average Trading Volume: 1,217,805

data.title: Broadway Industrial Faces Acquisition and Trading Implications
data.description:

United Overseas Bank, on behalf of Patec Pte. Ltd., has made a mandatory unconditional cash offer to acquire all outstanding shares of Broadway Industrial Group Limited, excluding those already owned by the offeror. This development may impact Broadway’s trading status and float in the market, raising important considerations for shareholders. Potential changes in listing status and shareholder rights under the Companies Act are also highlighted.
